scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:legacy && npm run build -w @vn-maker/engine-core && npm run typecheck -w @vn-maker/cli && npm run typecheck -w @vn-maker/web
scripts.build:legacy: npm run typecheck:legacy && npm run build:engine && npm run build:html
scripts.build:maker: npm run build -w @vn-maker/engine-core && npm run build -w @vn-maker/cli && npm run build -w @vn-maker/web
scripts.build: npm run build:legacy && npm run build:maker
